highPriority.researchSummary: Family-owned trucking company in Houma, LA. 1 power unit, 2 drivers. Authorized for hire, intrastate non-HM only. General freight. Also has DOT 4574836 registration. Zero inspections, zero crashes — clean record. MCS-150 filed April 2026 — very new authority. Connected to Zedrick E Spencer (inactive) at same address.
highPriority.outreachMessage:
Subject: Twin Mile Partnership — Expand Beyond Louisiana Lanes

Dear Jane,

I hope this finds you well. I came across DALECO LLC while researching quality carriers in the Houma area and was impressed by your clean safety record — zero crashes and zero out-of-service violations over the past 24 months. That tells me you run a disciplined operation.

I'm Marcus Chen, Sales Director at Twin Mile LLC, a power-only carrier based in Cypress, TX. We specialize in helping owner-operators like you expand from intrastate to interstate operations — unlocking higher-paying lanes across TX, LA, and the Gulf Coast.

Here's what I noticed: You currently operate intrastate-only in Louisiana. The I-10 corridor from Houma to Houston, Baton Rouge, and beyond is one of the busiest freight lanes in the country, and we have loads running those routes daily. By partnering with Twin Mile, you could:

- Access our load network across TX-LA-MS-AL without needing your own interstate authority
- Keep 100% of your wheels turning — we handle dispatch, billing, and compliance
- Earn $2.50-$3.50/mile on power-only loads with no trailer maintenance costs
- Get paid weekly with transparent rate confirmations

I'd love to discuss how we can help DALECO grow beyond Louisiana borders. Are you available for a 15-minute call this week? Reach me at (281) 710-7787 or reply to this email.

Best regards,
Marcus Chen
Sales Director, Twin Mile LLC
(281) 710-7787 | marcus@twinmile.com

highPriority.researchSummary: Austin, TX based prospect. No DOT number on file — likely a solo owner-operator or considering starting a trucking business. Austin is a major freight hub with strong TX-LA and TX-CA lane access.
highPriority.outreachMessage:
Subject: Twin Mile — Power-Only Opportunities for Austin Owner-Operators

Hi Alex,

My name is Marcus Chen with Twin Mile LLC out of Cypress, TX. I found your information through our carrier recruitment network and wanted to reach out.

Austin is positioned perfectly for some of the best freight lanes in the country — I-35 north to Dallas, I-10 east to Louisiana, and I-35 south to Laredo. If you're running a truck or thinking about getting your authority, we can help you maximize your earnings from day one.

Twin Mile specializes in power-only operations — we provide the loads, the trailers, and the back-office support so you can focus on driving. Here's what we offer:

- No trailer costs — you pull our trailers, we handle maintenance
- Weekly settlements with transparent rate con
- TX-LA, TX-CA, and regional lanes paying $2.50-$3.50/mile
- Fuel advances and quick pay available
- Help with authority, compliance, and IFTA if you're getting started

I'd love to learn more about your situation and see if there's a fit. Give me a call at (281) 710-7787 or let me know a good time to talk.

Best,
Marcus Chen
Sales Director, Twin Mile LLC
